stemHtml: Which statement is correct? The Ferrel cell..

options.a: extends from the subtropical jet stream towards the Equator.
options.b: is located closest to the Equator with the highest moisture content of all the cells.
options.c: is the connecting cell between the tropical Hadley cell and the polar cell.
options.d: is, of all the cells, the one with the lowest temperature and is located closest to the Pole.
